Collocation: thirst for knowledge;die of thirst;quench thirst
Example_EN: After the run she had a strong thirst for water.
Example_CN: 跑步后她非常想喝水。

Example_EN: Our first class of the week is on Monday.
Example_CN: 本周第一节课在星期一。

Example_EN: The meeting has been moved to Tuesday afternoon.
Example_CN: 会议改到星期二下午。

Example_EN: She always goes swimming on Wednesday.
Example_CN: 她总在星期三去游泳。

Example_EN: We will visit grandma this Thursday evening.
Example_CN: 我们这周四晚去看奶奶。

Example_EN: Many offices end early on Friday afternoon.
Example_CN: 许多办公室周五下午早下班。

Example_EN: The market is busiest on Saturday morning.
Example_CN: 集市周六上午最热闹。

Example_EN: They have a big family lunch every Sunday.
Example_CN: 他们每个星期天吃一顿丰盛的家庭午餐。

Example_EN: Schools usually reopen in early January.
Example_CN: 学校通常在一月初开学。

Example_EN: It often snows here in February.
Example_CN: 这里二月常常下雪。

Example_EN: The garden flowers open in April.
Example_CN: 花园的花在四月开放。

Example_EN: Exams finish in June at our school.
Example_CN: 我们学校考试在六月结束。

Example_EN: Many families travel in July for the summer holiday.
Example_CN: 许多家庭七月去度暑假。

Example_EN: The beach is crowded in August.
Example_CN: 八月海滩挤满了人。

Example_EN: The new term begins in September.
Example_CN: 新学期在九月开始。

Example_EN: Leaves start falling in October.
Example_CN: 十月树叶开始飘落。

Example_EN: We remember war victims in November.
Example_CN: 我们在十一月纪念战争死难者。

Example_EN: Christmas comes at the end of December.
Example_CN: 圣诞节在十二月末到来。

Example_EN: The temperature fell below zero last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚气温降到零度以下。

Example_EN: There are two apples left in the bowl.
Example_CN: 碗里还剩两个苹果。

Example_EN: She knocked three times on the door.
Example_CN: 她敲了三下门。

Example_EN: A year has four seasons in this climate.
Example_CN: 这种气候一年有四季。

Example_EN: Give me five minutes and I will be ready.
Example_CN: 再给我五分钟我就准备好了。

Example_EN: The film starts at half past six.
Example_CN: 电影六点半开始。

Example_EN: There are seven days in a week.
Example_CN: 一周有七天。

Example_EN: Children need about eight hours of sleep.
Example_CN: 儿童大约需要八小时睡眠。

Example_EN: The shop opens at nine o'clock sharp.
Example_CN: 商店九点整开门。

Example_EN: Count to ten before you reply in anger.
Example_CN: 愤怒回复前先数十下。

Example_EN: The train leaves at eleven in the morning.
Example_CN: 火车上午十一点开出。

Example_EN: There are twelve months in a year.
Example_CN: 一年有十二个月。

Example_EN: She turns thirteen next month.
Example_CN: 她下个月满十三岁。

Example_EN: The course lasts fourteen days in total.
Example_CN: 课程总共持续十四天。

Example_EN: Take a break every fifteen minutes when studying.
Example_CN: 学习时每十五分钟休息一下。

Example_EN: In the UK you can leave school at sixteen.
Example_CN: 在英国十六岁可以结束义务教育。

Example_EN: Seventeen students joined the new club.
Example_CN: 十七名学生加入了新社团。

Example_EN: You become an adult at eighteen in many countries.
Example_CN: 在许多国家十八岁成为成年人。

Example_EN: He scored nineteen points in the match.
Example_CN: 他在比赛中得了十九分。

Example_EN: The bus comes every twenty minutes.
Example_CN: 公交车每二十分钟一班。

Example_EN: About thirty students visited the museum.
Example_CN: 大约三十名学生参观了博物馆。

Example_EN: She has taught for forty years at this school.
Example_CN: 她在这所学校教了四十年书。

Example_EN: He paid fifty pounds for the train ticket.
Example_CN: 这张火车票他付了五十英镑。

Example_EN: There are sixty minutes in one hour.
Example_CN: 一小时有六十分钟。

Example_EN: Her grandfather is nearly seventy years old.
Example_CN: 她祖父快七十岁了。

Example_EN: Grandma is fit and active at eighty.
Example_CN: 奶奶八十岁仍健康活跃。

Example_EN: The match lasts ninety minutes plus stoppage time.
Example_CN: 比赛时长九十分钟加补时。

Example_EN: The hall can seat about one hundred people.
Example_CN: 大厅大约能坐一百人。

Example_EN: Thousands of fans waited outside the stadium.
Example_CN: 成千上万的球迷在球场外等候。

Example_EN: The city has more than one million residents.
Example_CN: 这座城市有一百多万居民。

Example_EN: The company is worth several billion pounds.
Example_CN: 该公司价值数十亿英镑。

Example_EN: She finished in third place in the race.
Example_CN: 她在比赛中获得第三名。

Example_EN: Our classroom is on the fourth floor.
Example_CN: 我们的教室在四楼。

Example_EN: This is the fifth time he has called today.
Example_CN: 这是他今天第五次打电话。

Example_EN: The singer left the stage to warm applause.
Example_CN: 歌手在热烈掌声中离开舞台。

Example_EN: A ray of sunlight came through the clouds.
Example_CN: 一束阳光穿过云层。

Example_EN: The lawyer prepared careful notes for her client.
Example_CN: 律师为委托人仔细准备了笔记。

Example_EN: Paying that much for a ticket is ridiculous.
Example_CN: 花那么多钱买票太荒唐了。

Collocation: whoever wants;whoever it is;give it to whoever
Example_EN: Whoever finishes first will win a small prize.
Example_CN: 谁先完成谁就赢得小奖品。

Example_EN: Children love telling ghost stories at night.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢夜里讲鬼故事。

Collocation: pardon me;ask for pardon;I beg your pardon
Example_EN: Pardon me, could you repeat that address?
Example_CN: 对不起，能把地址再说一遍吗？

Example_EN: Thanks for your help; you have been super.
Example_CN: 谢谢帮忙，你真是太好了。

Example_EN: The view from the top was absolutely incredible.
Example_CN: 山顶景色绝对令人难以置信。

Example_EN: The charity supports suicide prevention programmes.
Example_CN: 该慈善机构支持自杀预防项目。

Example_EN: Students mix chemicals carefully in the science lab.
Example_CN: 学生在科学实验室小心混合化学品。

Collocation: bullet hole;fire a bullet;dodge a bullet
Example_EN: Police found a bullet hole in the wall.
Example_CN: 警方在墙上发现弹孔。

Example_EN: The museum has a medieval sword on display.
Example_CN: 博物馆展出一把中世纪长剑。

Example_EN: Stars are bright enough to see with the naked eye.
Example_CN: 这些星星肉眼即可看见。

Collocation: my goodness;goodness of heart;out of goodness
Example_EN: My goodness, look at the size of that cake!
Example_CN: 天哪，看看那个蛋糕有多大！

Example_EN: That was a clever way to solve the puzzle.
Example_CN: 那是解谜的巧妙办法。

Collocation: big bang;bang the door;with a bang
Example_EN: We heard a loud bang from the kitchen.
Example_CN: 我们听见厨房传来一声巨响。

Example_EN: The news media covered the storm for days.
Example_CN: 新闻媒体连日报道这场风暴。
MemoryTip: medium 复数常作 media：媒体。

Example_EN: Children laughed at the monkey in the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们看着动物园的猴子发笑。

Example_EN: She works as a junior doctor in this hospital.
Example_CN: 她在这家医院当初级医生。

Collocation: punch a hole;throw a punch;fruit punch
Example_EN: He used a tool to punch a hole in the belt.
Example_CN: 他用工具在腰带上打了个孔。

Collocation: cure for;cure a disease;find a cure
Example_EN: Doctors hope to find a cure for the disease.
Example_CN: 医生希望找到这种病的疗法。

Collocation: commit a sin;sin of pride;deadly sin
Example_EN: In the story, pride is treated as a serious sin.
Example_CN: 故事里骄傲被当作严重罪过。

Example_EN: The film shows friendly aliens visiting Earth.
Example_CN: 电影讲述友好外星人造访地球。

Example_EN: There was a nasty smell coming from the fridge.
Example_CN: 冰箱里散发出难闻气味。

Example_EN: The detective found a useful clue near the door.
Example_CN: 侦探在门边发现有用线索。

Example_EN: The museum shows clothes worn by an ancient emperor.
Example_CN: 博物馆展出古代皇帝穿过的衣服。

Example_EN: Hikers must watch for snakes on dry rocks.
Example_CN: 徒步者须提防干岩石上的蛇。

Example_EN: Let's meet sometime next week for coffee.
Example_CN: 我们下周找个时间喝咖啡吧。
MemoryTip: some + time：某个时候（与 sometimes 不同）。

Example_EN: She will speak at an education conference in May.
Example_CN: 她将在五月的一个教育会议上发言。

Example_EN: You need permission from the local authority.
Example_CN: 你需要得到地方当局的许可。

Example_EN: An apple a day is a familiar health saying.
Example_CN: 一天一苹果是一句熟悉的健康俗语。

Example_EN: They pulled the boat ashore with a thick rope.
Example_CN: 他们用粗绳把船拉上岸。

Collocation: flesh and blood;flesh wound;flesh of the fruit
Example_EN: Cut away the flesh of the peach carefully.
Example_CN: 小心地切下桃子的果肉。

Example_EN: If you practise daily, you are bound to improve.
Example_CN: 若天天练习，你一定会进步。

Example_EN: Fans stood to cheer for their team.
Example_CN: 球迷起立为自己的球队欢呼。

Example_EN: The punishment for cheating is a failing mark.
Example_CN: 作弊的惩罚是该科不及格。

Collocation: high fever;fever of excitement;catch a fever
Example_EN: The child stayed in bed with a high fever.
Example_CN: 孩子发高烧卧床休息。

Example_EN: She speaks English with a soft Scottish accent.
Example_CN: 她说英语带着柔和的苏格兰口音。

Example_EN: I am terribly sorry for the late reply.
Example_CN: 这么晚回复我非常抱歉。

Example_EN: Helping strangers can be a noble act.
Example_CN: 帮助陌生人可以是高尚之举。

Example_EN: Legend has it that treasure lies under the hill.
Example_CN: 传说山下藏着宝藏。

Example_EN: Gross income is money before tax is taken.
Example_CN: 总收入是税前所得。
MemoryTip: gross：总的，口语也指令人恶心。

Example_EN: He bought a new cricket bat for the season.
Example_CN: 他为赛季买了新板球拍。

Collocation: in a lifetime;lifetime ban;of a lifetime
Example_EN: Meeting her was the experience of a lifetime.
Example_CN: 遇见她是一生难忘的经历。

Collocation: cheat in an exam;cheat on;tax cheat
Example_EN: Students who cheat in exams will face punishment.
Example_CN: 考试作弊的学生将受处罚。

Example_EN: Please finish your homework before watching TV.
Example_CN: 看电视前请先做完作业。

Example_EN: The injury was painful but healed in two weeks.
Example_CN: 伤势痛苦，但两周后痊愈。
